ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "lastname" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (SSN) of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_enrollment" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled in the university */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., active, graduated, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the course is worth */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the instructor was hired */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolling in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, dropped, completed) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the test belongs to */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the test in the final grade */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., midterm, final, quiz) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the grade */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the grade belongs to */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student (e.g., A, B, C, D) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback for the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the score */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the score belongs to */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score received by the student */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score possible in the test */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the score was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback for the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the notification */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the notification is related to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (student, instructor, administrator) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)
